# Sendfable

> Email marketing for ordinary small businesses: add people, create an email, send it.
> Platform delivery via Amazon SES. Any email signup (no Google/Microsoft OAuth required).

## Primary pages
- https://sendfable.com/
- https://sendfable.com/pricing
- https://sendfable.com/features
- https://sendfable.com/deliverability
- https://sendfable.com/templates
- https://sendfable.com/migrate
- https://sendfable.com/compare/mailchimp

## Notes
- Crawlable HTML, sitemap.xml, and robots.txt are the source of truth.
- Authenticated app routes, tracking pixels, and private campaign data are not for indexing.
- Competitor pricing on comparison pages includes a "last checked" date and may change.
